title: SPEEDWOX 6pcs Pool Filter Spider Gasket Kit with Spider Washer for Hayward Vario-Flo Valves Replacement Parts Compatible with SP0710 SP0710X SP0711 SP0712 O-Rings Seal Parts for Sand Filter Pumps
features: 【WHAT YOU GET】1pcs PX0714T spider washer, 1pcs SPX0714L O-ring, 1 plastic snap ring (not fully connected), 1pcs black rubber washer, and 1pcs rubber washer (small).
【MATERIAL】Made of high-quality PVC, it is soft and sturdy, resistant to damage, and can enhance and improve your filtration system.

【EASY TO USE】Installing these gaskets is a breeze. Simply unscrew the valve, peel off the old gasket, and install the Hayward pool filter gasket in the corresponding position as shown in the diagram. (Tip: Before installation, soak the gasket in lubricating oil for a short time to make it easier to install.)

【COMPATIBILITY】Suitable for Hayward Vari-Flo valve filtration system components. Compatible with Hayward Vari-Flo XL valves, pool filter parts, pool pump parts, pool sand filter parts, and multi-port valve parts. Compatible with Hayward SP0714T, SP0710, SP710X, SP0711, and SP0712 series valves.
【APPLICATION】These O-ring gaskets are ideal for repairing leaks in swimming pool pumps. They provide a tight seal on valves to prevent leaks and keep filters operating efficiently.
